title: final_deliverable
description: Packaged run output for operators (SPEC §7.10 deliverable, §12.3). v1: markdown body plus explicit limitations; Phase 0 is low-quality by design.

run_id.description: Editorial run id (same as run manifest run_id, SPEC §12.1).

format.description: Primary body format for v1 (extend later for HTML/PDF, etc.).

body_markdown.description: Deliverable body aligned with `final/piece.md` for this run.

limitations.description: Known caveats for this run (SPEC §12.6 legibility; §15.3 when weaknesses remain).

summary.description: Short operator-facing recap of packaging / readiness.
